name: dot-sampler
description: Upload any image and rearrange it as a field of circular dot samples, inspired by the cut-and-rearranged photography of Kensuke Koike. Design your own dot layout in the pattern editor.

name: scrolling-video
description: A web component to allow anyone to create a scrolling video. The repo's README has some best practices, including a quick guide and templates for how to pre-process your video with Handbrake.
